name: Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd.
summary: Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd. provides industry-specific software solutions in the Greater China and South East Asia. It offers ERP/ERPII solutions, including T-series products for large size companies; E-series products for medium size companies; C-series products for small companies; and A-series cloud services for small to micro businesses. The company serves manufacturing, distribution and retail, and micro and small enterprises. Digiwin Software Co.,Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
